invalid_partial_attempts.reason_not_counted: Claude returned a non-verdict partial response that said it would read files and did not provide PASS, findings, or closeout decision.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Edit,Write,MultiEdit,Bash --json-schema --output-format json

required_followups: Create docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s08 closeout evidence so npm run rp00:control-plane:validate passes; this is the normal post-review closeout step, not a code defect.
review_notes: Scope is confined to S08 with no edits to S01-S07 logic, other entrypoints, routes, or UI.
S02-S07, M00, permission/audit, TEN-001 through TEN-008, validation contexts, and acceptance gates are carried and pinned by the result validator.
Missing, invalid, wrong-source S07 input and every forbidden or unknown non-false claim throw fail-closed.
All hazard flags are hard false; result and receipt are frozen and metadata-only.
Policy, service, validators, tests, fixture, README, contract, and RP00 validator align; fixture parity is full deepEqual.
parsed_review.summary: RP00.P02.M03.S08 is a clean, additive, metadata-only Hermes Validation Secondary workflow path implementation. Claude reported PASS / GO with no P0/P1/P2/P3 findings and no closeout block. The only follow-up is normal S08 closeout evidence creation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS / GO with no findings; only required follow-up was normal S08 closeout evidence creation.
